_comments: Mutation testing across the project's pure helpers (phase 16c) and
the three NestJS services Phase E covers with mocked-Prisma Vitest
Controllers + CRUD-shape services stay out — no logic to mutate.
The vitest runner reads the root vitest.config include, which
aggregates the contracts + db + api-service suites. coverageAnalysis
perTest scopes each mutant to only the tests that touch the mutated
line, keeping the run under a minute on a laptop.
The break threshold below mirrors tests/mutation/budget.json. CI reads
the same number so dev and CI agree on the gate.
